PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
TENTATIVE RULING: Grant without hearing. Status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for 12/13/2027.
EXAMINER: AERO FETH

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-13-2026 Continued To Jun-10-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Agnieska Adams appeared zoom for Mark Unger (petitioner).

Counsel to re-notice the petition to the Greek consulate, and to the 2 minors in Greece that are residing in an orphanage. The matter is continued to Jun 10, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.
